name: SOC Alert Adjudicator
description: Stage 2 LLM adjudication agent for SOC alert triage. Accepts uncertain-band alerts from Stage 1 and returns structured true_positive/false_positive/needs_review verdicts with rationale.

skills.name: Triage Alert
skills.description: Adjudicate a single network security alert using LLM reasoning over SHAP features and historical precedents.
